PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort\('COM5', 115200, 'None', 8, 'One'\); $port.ReadTimeout = 500; $port.Open\(\); $port.DtrEnable = $false; $port.RtsEnable = $true; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100; $port.RtsEnable = $false; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100; $end = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(15\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $end\) { try { $line = $port.ReadLine\(\); Write-Output $line } catch [System.TimeoutException] { } }; $port.Close\(\))

Bash("C:\\Espressif\\python_env\\idf5.3_py3.13_env\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "data = open\(r'C:\\Users\\Phoebe Rhone Gangoso\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\serial\\serial.log','rb'\).read\(\); import re; clean = re.sub\(rb'\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*m', b'', data\); sys.stdout.buffer.write\(clean\) if False else print\(clean.decode\('utf-8','replace'\)\)")

PowerShell($serial = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort 'COM6', 115200, 'None', 8, 'One'; $serial.NewLine = "`n"; $serial.ReadTimeout = 200; try { $serial.Open\(\); $serial.RtsEnable = $true; $serial.DtrEnable = $false; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100; $serial.RtsEnable = $false; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(12\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { if \($serial.BytesToRead -gt 0\) { [Console]::Out.Write\($serial.ReadExisting\(\)\) } else { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50 } } } finally { if \($serial.IsOpen\) { $serial.Close\(\) }; $serial.Dispose\(\) })
